task.title: Phase 2: report_file option for send_message and report_done

messages.content:
DONE: report_file param added to send_message and report_done.

Files changed:
- `src/mcp-server.ts`:
  - `send_message` schema: added `report_file?: boolean` property
  - `send_message` handler: when `report_file && to_id === 'human'`, writes full content to `.synapse/reports/<ts>-<slug>.md`, sends 10-line summary + file path to human
  - `report_done` schema: added `report_file?: boolean` property
  - `report_done` handler: full content still always sent to orchestrator; when `report_file`, writes to `.synapse/reports/<ts>-<slug>.md` and sends 5-line preview + path to human

Build: `tsc` clean.
report_file param live on send_message and report_done — long reports written to .synapse/reports/
